completed_tasks.name: Enable workflow.plan_review_convergence config flag
completed_tasks.detail: Set true via gsd config-set; verified true. Modified .planning/config.json (uncommitted).

completed_tasks.name: Install codex CLI
completed_tasks.detail: npm i -g @openai/codex -> codex-cli 0.144.1 at ~/AppData/Roaming/npm (codex, codex.cmd, codex.ps1 shims present).

completed_tasks.name: Convergence Cycle 1 review
completed_tasks.detail: Review agent ran; codex review FAILED on auth (0 bytes x2). REVIEWS.md committed as PARTIAL (commit 2a04e57) with honest reviewer_outcomes.codex.status=failed. Independent source-grounding pass recorded.

completed_tasks.name: Refuse false convergence
completed_tasks.detail: Did NOT declare convergence: the 0/0 CYCLE_SUMMARY came from the orchestrator's own grep pass, not codex. Escalated to user.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-run Cycle 1 with --codex; verify REVIEWS.md reviewer_outcomes.codex.status == success before trusting CYCLE_SUMMARY
Convergence loop: parse CYCLE_SUMMARY (current_high + current_actionable); replan inline via /gsd-plan-phase 0 --reviews --skip-research if >0; repeat up to 3 cycles with stall detection
On TRUE convergence (codex-reviewed, 0 HIGH, 0 actionable): gsd-tools state planned-phase --phase 0; next /gsd-execute-phase 0

blockers.description: Codex ChatGPT OAuth access token expired AND refresh token rejected (refresh_token_reused); every API call returned HTTP 401 token_expired. codex produced 0 bytes on both attempts. `codex login status` reports 'logged in' (stale).
blockers.workaround: Interactive `codex login` re-authentication (device/browser flow). Cannot be done headlessly.

blockers.description: The `!`-prefix Bash on this Windows host has NO node/npm/codex on PATH and STRIPS backslashes. `codex login`, `codex-cli login`, and `C:\Users\...\codex.ps1 login` all failed ('command not found' / mangled path).
blockers.workaround: Use forward slashes + .cmd shim, or augment PATH first (see human_actions_pending).

human_actions_pending.why: Required for --codex reviewer to produce a real cross-AI review (the whole point of this convergence run).
human_actions_pending.how: From THIS bash: export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$HOME/AppData/Roaming/npm:$PATH" && codex login   — OR from a PowerShell window: codex login (PowerShell has the npm dir on PATH). Do NOT use the C:\ backslash path in bash.

decisions.rationale: User explicitly chose --codex and re-authed to keep it; do not silently swap reviewers.

decisions.decision: Refused to declare convergence on a failed reviewer run
decisions.rationale: A failed/empty reviewer is not a clean review. CYCLE_SUMMARY 0/0 that did not come from codex is not valid convergence. Converging would silently point the user at /gsd-execute-phase 0 without the independent review the feature exists to provide.
User authorized 'Install codex CLI, then run with --codex'.

environment.node: C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe (v25.8.2) — NOT on default bash PATH
environment.npm_global_prefix: C:\Users\nhdinh\AppData\Roaming\npm — holds codex, gsd-tools, gsd_run, gsd-core, gitnexus, mslearn shims; NOT on default bash PATH
environment.codex: codex-cli 0.144.1 (installed this session); auth at ~/.codex/auth.json currently EXPIRED

next_action: User runs `codex login` (PowerShell, or bash with PATH fix). On confirm, re-spawn the Cycle-1 review agent for `/gsd-review --phase 0 --codex`, then verify REVIEWS.md frontmatter reviewer_outcomes.codex.status == success before reading CYCLE_SUMMARY.
context_notes: Mid /gsd-plan-review-convergence 0 --codex. Phase 0 already has 5 PLAN.md (skipped initial planning). Source-grounding pass found one REAL bug already fixed in PLAN 00-04: SAFE-02 token-count check inverted as `-ceq` in 00-RESEARCH.md:464 and 00-PATTERNS.md:252, corrected to `-cne` + test-gated at 00-04-PLAN.md:144,150-151. Only LOW doc-hygiene residuals remain (stale -ceq snippets; 00-RESEARCH.md:233 ordering prose) — non-execution-affecting. Repo is greenfield PowerShell (0 *.ps1/*.psm1/*.psd1) so all plan-cited symbols are forward references = UNCHECKABLE/new, not MISSING. Memory note in force: review plans before executing — do NOT silently chain toward execute on a bogus convergence.
